title: Fixed Platform Puzzle
description: Grid-based logic puzzle game. Move colored blocks off the board in the correct order. One wrong move and you're stuck - plan carefully!
long_description:
Test your strategic thinking with 50 hand-crafted puzzle levels. Drag blocks toward any edge to remove them, but watch out - the order matters! Block your own path and you'll have to start over.

- 50 levels with smooth difficulty curve
- Mobile, tablet, and desktop support
- ASMR-quality satisfying sounds
- No timers, no stress - pure logic
- Auto-save progress

controls.mouse: Click + drag blocks toward an edge
controls.touch: Tap + swipe blocks toward an edge
